name: 天气助手
description: 天气助手模块，支持查询城市当前天气、未来多日天气预报，使用Open-Meteo免费API，无需密钥
description_en: Weather assistant module, query current weather and multi-day forecast for any city using Open-Meteo free API

permissions.name: android.permission.INTERNET
permissions.desc: 用于查询天气API获取天气数据
permissions.desc_en: Access weather API for weather data

permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
permissions.desc: 用于获取精确位置以查询当前位置天气
permissions.desc_en: Get precise location for local weather

permissions.name: android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
permissions.desc: 用于获取大致位置以查询当前位置天气
permissions.desc_en: Get approximate location for local weather

apis.name: getCurrentWeather
apis.desc: 查询指定城市的当前天气；city为空时自动使用GPS定位获取当地天气
apis.desc_en: Get current weather for a city; if city is empty, auto-detect location via GPS
paramDesc: 城市名称（可选，留空则自动定位）
paramDesc_en: City name (optional, empty to use GPS location)

apis.name: getForecast
apis.desc: 查询指定城市未来多日天气预报；city为空时自动使用GPS定位
apis.desc_en: Get multi-day forecast; if city is empty, auto-detect location via GPS
paramDesc: 城市名称（可选，留空则自动定位）
paramDesc_en: City name (optional, empty to use GPS location)

apis.name: getWeatherByLocation
apis.desc: 根据经纬度坐标查询天气，用于已知坐标的场景

apis.name: openPage
apis.desc: 打开天气助手界面并返回 _openModule 信号
apis.desc_en: Open Weather UI and return _openModule signal
